text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Training can be so draining. Everyone<n>looks
exhausted...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If only I could give them something to<n>help
replenish their strength.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps something sweet or a light<n>snack...
Although something filling could<n>be good too...
Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, why not? I'll just make aaall ofthose!
